Rule.title: Test Rule Title

check.check-content: echo "Checking text..." if [ 1 -eq 0 ]; then exit 1 fi

Rule.fixtext: To fix, run this command: ```bash echo "Fixing text..." chmod 600 /etc/test ```

Rule.title: Test Rule Title Windows
Rule.fixtext: To fix, run this command: ```powershell Set-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\Some\Path" -Name "Value" -Value 1 ```
